name: Cell Phone Wallet Pocket with Crossbody Strap - heyday™ Abstract
description:
Keep cards safe with your phone with this Cell Phone Wallet Pocket with Crossbody Strap from heyday™. This phone card pocket sports a fun abstract pattern that matches your personal style. It’s easy to attach to the back of most smartphones, letting you reach for your credit or ID cards with ease anywhere you go.

heyday™ Let your style speak volumes.
